description_long: This is a single high-top sneaker, predominantly purple with white accents and a white rubber sole. The shoe features a classic canvas upper, metal eyelets for laces, and a visible circular patch on the side, reminiscent of Converse Chuck Taylor All Star designs. The laces are white and threaded in a standard criss-cross pattern, and the toe cap is reinforced with white rubber. The outsole is slightly textured, providing grip, and the midsole has a thin colored stripe running along its edge. The shoe appears clean, structurally intact, and shows no visible signs of wear or dirt, suggesting it is in new or like-new condition.
description: A purple high-top sneaker with white laces, rubber toe cap, and a circular side patch, clean and in excellent condition.
description_view_0: Side view showing the purple canvas upper, white laces, and a circular patch on the shoe's outer side.
description_view_1: Rear or bottom view, mostly showing the sole and the shoe's silhouette with minimal detail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, highlighting the shoe's profile, white toe cap, and the colored stripe on the midsole.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the lacing, toe cap, and the overall clean appearance of the shoe.
